## summary

brief description of changes.

## related issues

fixes #(issue number) or relates to #(issue number).

## check list

- [ ] tested locally (opened `index.html` or used static server)
- [ ] verified both dark and light themes
- [ ] checked responsive behavior on mobile / desktop
- [ ] no external build dependencies introduced
- [ ] accessibility labels / focus states preserved

## additional notes

any extra context for reviewers.
